# thoth_governance_tools (Data Source)

Reads aggregated governance telemetry grouped by tool.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum tools to return.
- `window_hours` (Number) Trailing window in hours.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Tool telemetry rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total matching tools.
